_source: Design/fundamentals/environment.md §2 — starter phrases, refine iteratively with Ivan
_changelog: 0.2.0 (A0): Torches → wall-mounted iron; Chasm walkways сделаны origin-нейтральными; oil lanterns убраны из HumanGarrison (свет — ось lighting); organic-токен убран из max anomaly-модификатора (уходит в будущую ось Biomass)

baseStyle._lightingRule: Источник света задаёт ось lighting (по умолчанию Torches). Свет ТОЛЬКО локальный — факелы, бра, дворфьи артефакты, геотермальные жилы (на Reheating). Никаких прорубов в потолке, дневного света, неба, god-rays, ambient-засветки. См. comfyui_api_integration.md §7. lightingDirective идёт первым в промпте — там у SDXL максимальный attention.
baseStyle.lightingDirective: deep underground world with no sun and no electricity, warm firelight the only kind of illumination, warm orange-red color temperature, most of the scene drowned in shadow, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, single visible flame as the brightest point, sharp falloff into pitch black
baseStyle.positive: dark fantasy underground environment, fully enclosed sealed ceiling, industrial decay, grim oppressive atmosphere, muted limited color palette, highly detailed environment concept art
baseStyle.negative: bright, colorful, cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, watermark, text, signature, oversaturated, cheerful, sunny, modern, hole in ceiling, ceiling opening, opening to surface, broken ceiling, collapsed ceiling, sky, sky light, skylight, daylight, sunlight, sun rays, god rays, light shaft from above, beam of light from ceiling, outdoor lighting, natural daylight, overcast sky, stars, moon, bright ambient light, soft daylight, even illumination, top-down lighting, overhead lighting, fill light from above, high-key lighting, well-lit scene, bright atmosphere, atmospheric daylight haze, glowing fog above, cinematic key light, dramatic rim light from above, cold lighting, blue lighting, cool white light, bluish glow, cyan glow, blue color cast, teal color cast, cold color grading, moonlight, cold ambient glow, fluorescent light, LED light, neon light, electric light, modern lighting, studio lighting, white light, pale white glow, grey ambient light, blue-grey light, silver light, cool highlights, desaturated cold tones, overcast ambient light, skylight ambience, light from unseen source

depth.label: Depth
depth.description: глубина этажа; driver для AnomalyIntensity и ThermalZone

lighting.label: Lighting
lighting.description: источник света в кадре; в мире нет солнца и электричества — только огонь, геотермика и кристаллы

values.label: Torches
values.phrase: wall-mounted iron torches, flickering orange flames, pools of firelight against deep shadow

values.label: Dwarven Lanterns
values.phrase: dwarven oil lanterns in brass housings, steady warm amber lamplight, pools of golden light

values.label: Campfire
values.phrase: small campfire on the ground, warm glow cast from below, drifting embers, thin smoke

values.label: Geothermal
values.phrase: deep red-orange glow of geothermal vents, molten light seeping through cracks in the rock, heat shimmer

values.label: Crystal Glow
values.phrase: soft warm amber radiance of luminous crystals, dim mineral glow

values.label: Near Dark
values.phrase: near-total darkness, one tiny distant flame, barely discernible silhouettes of rock

values.label: Stone
values.phrase: rough ancient stone, weathered grey rock surfaces, layered rock strata, dim torchlight on bare rock

values.label: Ice
values.phrase: ice-encrusted walls, glistening frost, frozen surfaces reflecting warm torchlight, hanging icicles, frozen mist in the air

values.label: Dwarven Metal
values.phrase: dwarven forged metal plating, riveted iron walls, blackened brass fittings, oxidized copper conduits, industrial dwarven craftsmanship

values.label: Organic
values.phrase: wet biological growths, fleshy organic walls, pulsing biomass, dripping membranes, mutated dwarven bio-reactors

values.label: Crystal
values.phrase: luminous mineral crystals embedded in the walls, faint warm amber inner glow, refractions of firelight, jagged crystal clusters

values.label: Corridor
values.phrase: narrow linear corridor, flat floor, low ceiling, claustrophobic passage receding into darkness

values.label: Hall
values.phrase: regular dwarven hall, balanced proportions, columned interior, structured architecture

values.label: Shaft
values.phrase: vertical shaft, rusted ladders and chains, plunging depth, vertiginous descent

values.label: Cavern
values.phrase: vast irregular cavern, uneven floor and ceiling, natural rock formations, deep shadows in distant recesses

values.label: Maze
values.phrase: tangled maze of branching passages, dense interconnections, disorienting geometry

values.label: Chasm
values.phrase: yawning chasm, sheer abyssal drop, narrow precarious crossings, broken railings

values.label: Natural
values.phrase: wild natural cave shaped by geological forces, water-eroded rock contours, stalactites and stalagmites, jagged raw stone, untouched primeval geology

values.label: Dwarven Tech
values.phrase: functional dwarven infrastructure, pipes and gauges, geothermal conduits, sturdy industrial fittings

values.label: Dwarven Residential
values.phrase: dwarven residential architecture, carved doorways, ornamental stonework, low domestic furniture, hearths

values.label: Human-Adapted
values.phrase: crude human retrofits layered over dwarven stonework, wooden scaffolds, iron bars, makeshift mortar patches

values.label: Human Frontier
values.phrase: abandoned human frontier outpost, collapsed timber, rusted weapons, tattered banners, signs of hasty retreat

values.label: None
values.phrase: empty of intelligent occupants, undisturbed dust, only ambient ecology

values.label: Goblins
values.phrase: goblin tribal markings, crude bone fetishes, scattered refuse, primitive barricades and traps

values.label: Ratfolk
values.phrase: ratfolk nests of woven scrap, gnawed wooden beams, layers of filthy detritus, narrow tunnels worn through walls

values.label: Human Garrison
values.phrase: human garrison post, iron-banded chests, weapon racks, banners of the city guard

values.label: Human Exiles
values.phrase: feral human exile camp, ragged shelters, cannibal trophies, scrawled mad glyphs on the walls

values.label: Dwarven Remains
values.phrase: long-dead dwarven bodies, scattered artifacts, abandoned journals, dust-covered tools, signs of an ancient evacuation

values.label: Deep Hostile
values.phrase: alien deep-hostile presence, twisted nests, biological residue, unnatural markings, fragments of monstrous moltings

camera.label: Camera
camera.description: ракурс и кадрирование сцены — чисто визуальная ось для мудборда, не влияет на лор

values.label: Establishing Wide
values.phrase: wide establishing shot, expansive view of the whole space, deep receding perspective

values.label: Eye Level
values.phrase: eye-level first-person vantage, standing inside the space, natural human perspective

values.label: Low Angle Up
values.phrase: low angle looking steeply upward, towering walls rising overhead, oppressive verticality

values.label: High Angle Down
values.phrase: high angle looking down into the depths, overlook from above, strong sense of the drop below

values.label: Material Close-up
values.phrase: extreme close-up of the surface, macro detail of texture and material, shallow depth of field

values.label: Threshold
values.phrase: framed through a doorway in the foreground, threshold composition, dark frame around a lit interior beyond

condition.label: Condition
condition.description: степень сохранности постройки/пространства (env.md §9 — изношенный/изломанный/повреждённый); ортогональна Origin

values.label: Pristine
values.phrase: pristine intact construction, clean precise surfaces, freshly built, no damage or wear

values.label: Worn
values.phrase: worn and aged, patina of long use, scuffed surfaces, fine cracks and settled dust

values.label: Ruined
values.phrase: ruined and crumbling, collapsed sections, scattered rubble and debris, structural failure

values.label: Battle-Damaged
values.phrase: battle-scarred, scorch marks and impact craters, shattered fixtures, signs of violent fighting

values.label: Overgrown
values.phrase: overtaken by encrustation, reclaimed by the underground, creeping mineral and fungal deposits over everything

anomalyModifiers.phrase: subtle perspective shifts, faint reality bleed at the edges of vision
impossible geometry, warped angles, distorted shadows, unstable flickering light, materials that seem wrong
deeply surreal impossible geometry, fractured reality, hallucinatory atmosphere, light bleeding from nowhere

Cooling.phrase: cold air, thin frost on metalwork, breath condensing

DeepFreeze.phrase: extreme cold, everything sheathed in ice, brittle frozen surfaces

Reheating.phrase: rising heat, faint glow of distant geothermal vents, heat-warped metal

_biomassNote: Biomass — скалярная ось «органической порчи» (env.md §12, мутировавшие гномьи биореакторы). По умолчанию следует за depth (см. axis_rules.json biomassIntensity, зеркалит anomaly), но перекрывается selection.biomass. Подавляется в холодных зонах правилом optimizer_rules.json.

biomassModifiers.phrase: faint organic film in the crevices, patches of pale fungal growth
creeping fleshy growths spreading over the surfaces, pulsing biomass in the cracks, mutated dwarven bio-reactor residue
rampant organic corruption engulfing the walls, throbbing masses of biomass, mutated fleshy intrusions, dripping membranes
